About

A bit about me.

I'm a software engineer based in [City]. I enjoy working on problems that sit at the intersection of good engineering and good design — systems that are robust under the hood and clear to the people who use them.

Outside of work, I'm usually exploring new tools in the open-source ecosystem, reading, or spending time outdoors.

Languages & Frameworks

Python TypeScript Go React Node.js SQL

Tools & Platforms

AWS Docker PostgreSQL Redis GitHub Actions

Work History

2022 — Present

Senior Software Engineer

Company Name

Led backend development for a core data platform serving 2M+ users. Redesigned the ingestion pipeline, reducing processing latency by 40%. Mentored junior engineers and drove adoption of new testing standards across the team.

2019 — 2022

Software Engineer

Previous Company

Built and maintained RESTful APIs for a SaaS product. Collaborated closely with design and product to ship features on a two-week release cycle. Introduced end-to-end testing that reduced production incidents by 30%.

2017 — 2019

Junior Developer

First Company

Supported full-stack development on internal tooling and client-facing dashboards. Gained strong foundations in React, Python, and agile workflows.

Projects

01

Project Alpha

A CLI tool for visualizing dependency graphs in large monorepos. Parses lockfiles and generates an interactive SVG output.

Go SVG
GitHub ↗

02

Datastream

Real-time event pipeline built with Kafka and Go. Handles 50k events/sec with exactly-once delivery guarantees.

Kafka Go
GitHub ↗

03

Noted

A minimalist markdown notes app with local-first storage, end-to-end encryption, and optional cloud sync.

React SQLite
Live ↗

04

OpenBench

Open-source benchmarking toolkit for REST APIs. Supports scripted scenarios, percentile reporting, and CI integration.
